contents.value:
```css
display: flex;
```
Sets the element to use flexbox layout model.

```css
display: grid;
```
Sets the element to use CSS Grid layout model.

```css
display: block;
```
Sets the element to block-level display.

```css
display: none;
```
Hides the element completely from the layout.

```css
padding: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets padding on all four sides to 1rem.

```css
padding: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets padding on all four sides to 0.5rem.

```css
margin: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets margin on all four sides to 0.5rem.

```css
margin: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets margin on all four sides to 1rem.

```css
margin: -1rem; /* -16px */
```
Sets negative margin on all four sides.

```css
padding-left: 1rem; /* 16px */
padding-right: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets horizontal padding to 1rem.

```css
padding-top: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
padding-bottom: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets vertical padding to 0.5rem.

```css
gap: 1rem; /* 16px */
```
Sets the gap between flex/grid items.

```css
font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
line-height: 1.75rem; /* 28px */
```
Sets font size to large.

```css
font-size: 1.25rem; /* 20px */
line-height: 1.75rem; /* 28px */
```
Sets font size to extra large.

```css
font-size: 0.875rem; /* 14px */
line-height: 1.25rem; /* 20px */
```
Sets font size to small.

```css
font-weight: 700;
```
Sets bold font weight.

```css
font-weight: 600;
```
Sets semi-bold font weight.

```css
background-color: #3b82f6;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/3b82f6/3b82f6.png) Blue 500 from the default color palette.

```css
background-color: #ffffff;
```
Sets background to white.

```css
background-color: #f3f4f6;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/f3f4f6/f3f4f6.png) Gray 100 — a very light gray.

```css
color: #ffffff;
```
Sets text color to white.

```css
color: #374151;
```
![color](https://via.placeholder.com/12/374151/374151.png) Gray 700 — medium-dark gray for body text.

```css
border-radius: 0.5rem; /* 8px */
```
Sets border radius to large (0.5rem).

```css
border-radius: 0.75rem; /* 12px */
```
Sets border radius to extra large (0.75rem).

```css
border-radius: 9999px;
```
Sets fully rounded corners, creating a circle for square elements.

```css
box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
```
Applies a medium drop shadow.

```css
box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
```
Applies a large drop shadow.

```css
width: 100%;
```
Sets width to 100% of the parent.

```css
height: 100vh;
```
Sets height to 100% of the viewport height.

```css
align-items: center;
```
Vertically centers flex/grid children along the cross axis.

```css
justify-content: center;
```
Horizontally centers flex/grid children along the main axis.
